en: And the word of Samuel came to all Israel. Now Israel went out to battle against the Philistines. They encamped at Ebenezer, and the Philistines encamped at Aphek.
zh: 撒母耳的話傳遍了以色列。那時，以色列人出去迎戰非利士人，他們靠近以便以謝安營，非利士人卻在亞弗安營。

en: The Philistines drew up in line against Israel, and when the battle spread, Israel was defeated by the Philistines, who killed about four thousand men on the field of battle.
zh: 非利士人列陣，要與以色列人交戰。戰事展開後，以色列人敗在非利士人面前，非利士人在戰場上殺了約四千人。

en: And when the troops came to the camp, the elders of Israel said, "Why has the LORD defeated us today before the Philistines? Let us bring the ark of the covenant of the LORD here from Shiloh, that it may come among us and save us from the power of our enemies."
zh: 軍隊回到營裡，以色列的長老說：“今天耶和華為甚麼在非利士人面前擊敗我們呢？我們要把耶和華的約櫃從示羅抬到我們這裡來。約櫃一到我們中間，就會拯救我們脫離仇敵的手。”

en: So the people sent to Shiloh and brought from there the ark of the covenant of the LORD of hosts, who is enthroned on the cherubim. And the two sons of Eli, Hophni and Phinehas, were there with the ark of the covenant of God.
zh: 於是他們派人到示羅去，從那裡把坐在二基路伯中間萬軍之耶和華的約櫃抬來；以利的兩個兒子，何弗尼和非尼哈，也與 神的約櫃一同來了。

en: As soon as the ark of the covenant of the LORD came into the camp, all Israel gave a mighty shout, so that the earth resounded.
zh: 耶和華的約櫃來到營中的時候，以色列眾人就大聲歡呼，大地也迴聲響應。

en: And when the Philistines heard the noise of the shouting, they said, "What does this great shouting in the camp of the Hebrews mean?" And when they learned that the ark of the LORD had come to the camp,
zh: 非利士人聽見了歡呼的聲音，就問：“在希伯來人的營中為甚麼有這樣大聲的歡呼呢？”後來才知道耶和華的約櫃來到了營中。

en: the Philistines were afraid, for they said, "A god has come into the camp." And they said, "Woe to us! For nothing like this has happened before.
zh: 非利士人就害怕起來，他們說：“有神來到他們的營中了。”又說：“我們有禍了！因為從來沒有這樣的事。

en: Woe to us! Who can deliver us from the power of these mighty gods? These are the gods who struck the Egyptians with every sort of plague in the wilderness.
zh: 我們有禍了！從前在曠野用各樣災禍擊打埃及人的，就是這些神。誰能救我們脫離這些大能之神的手呢？

en: Take courage, and be men, O Philistines, lest you become slaves to the Hebrews as they have been to you; be men and fight."
zh: 非利士人哪！你們要剛強，要作大丈夫，免得你們作希伯來人的奴僕，好像他們作過你們的奴僕一樣；你們要作大丈夫，作戰吧！”

en: So the Philistines fought, and Israel was defeated, and they fled, every man to his home. And there was a very great slaughter, for there fell of Israel thirty thousand foot soldiers.
zh: 於是非利士人起來作戰，以色列人就被擊敗，各人都往自己的帳棚逃跑。這是一場大屠殺，以色列人中有三萬步兵陣亡。

en: And the ark of God was captured, and the two sons of Eli, Hophni and Phinehas, died.
zh: 神的約櫃也被搶去，以利的兩個兒子何弗尼和非尼哈也死了。

en: A man of Benjamin ran from the battle line and came to Shiloh the same day, with his clothes torn and with dirt on his head.
zh: 有一個便雅憫人跑離戰場，衣服撕裂，頭蒙塵土，當天來到示羅。

en: When he arrived, Eli was sitting on his seat by the road watching, for his heart trembled for the ark of God. And when the man came into the city and told the news, all the city cried out.
zh: 他來到的時候，以利正在路旁坐在自己的椅子上觀望，因為他為 神的約櫃擔憂戰慄。那人進城裡報信，全城的人就都喊叫起來。

en: When Eli heard the sound of the outcry, he said, "What is this uproar?" Then the man hurried and came and told Eli.
zh: 以利聽見喊叫的聲音，就問：“這喧嚷的聲音是甚麼意思呢？”那人急忙前來，向以利報告。

en: Now Eli was ninety-eight years old and his eyes were set so that he could not see.
zh: 那時以利九十八歲了，眼睛發直，不能看見。

en: And the man said to Eli, "I am he who has come from the battle; I fled from the battle today." And he said, "How did it go, my son?"
zh: 那人告訴以利：“我是從戰場上來的，今天從戰場上逃回來。”以利問：“我兒，事情怎麼樣？”

en: He who brought the news answered and said, "Israel has fled before the Philistines, and there has also been a great defeat among the people. Your two sons also, Hophni and Phinehas, are dead, and the ark of God has been captured."
zh: 報信的人回答，說：“以色列人在非利士人面前逃跑，傷亡慘重，你兩個兒子何弗尼和非尼哈也都死了，民中被殺的甚多， 神的約櫃也被搶去了。”

en: As soon as he mentioned the ark of God, Eli fell over backward from his seat by the side of the gate, and his neck was broken and he died, for the man was old and heavy. He had judged Israel forty years.
zh: 因為以利年老體重，報信的人一提到 神的約櫃，以利就從椅子上往後跌倒在門旁，頸骨折斷而死。以利治理了以色列四十年。

en: Now his daughter-in-law, the wife of Phinehas, was pregnant, about to give birth. And when she heard the news that the ark of God was captured, and that her father-in-law and her husband were dead, she bowed and gave birth, for her pains came upon her.
zh: 以利的媳婦，非尼哈的妻子懷了孕，產期近了；她一聽見 神的約櫃被搶去，以及她公公和丈夫都死了的消息，就忽然感到疼痛，曲身生產了。

en: And about the time of her death the women attending her said to her, "Do not be afraid, for you have borne a son." But she did not answer or pay attention.
zh: 她快要死的時候，站在旁邊的婦女們對她說：“不要怕，你生了一個兒子！”她卻不回答，也不理會。

en: And she named the child Ichabod, saying, "The glory has departed from Israel!" because the ark of God had been captured and because of her father-in-law and her husband.
zh: 她給孩子起名叫以迦博，說：“榮耀已經離開以色列了。”這是因為 神的約櫃被搶去，又因為她的公公和丈夫都死了。

en: And she said, "The glory has departed from Israel, for the ark of God has been captured."
zh: 她說：“榮耀已經離開了以色列，因為 神的約櫃被搶去了。”
